attributes.title: [etcd OTel] gRPC Traffic
attributes.description: gRPC server metrics: request rates by service/method, error codes, and client request patterns.

params.markdown:
## [etcd OTel] gRPC Traffic

gRPC API traffic and health:
- Request rates by service and method
- Error code distribution
- Client request patterns
- Network throughput

query.esql:
TS metrics-etcd.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "etcd.otel" AND grpc_server_handled_total IS NOT NULL
| STATS rate = SUM(RATE(grpc_server_handled_total))

TS metrics-etcd.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "etcd.otel" AND grpc_server_handled_total IS NOT NULL
| STATS rate = SUM(RATE(grpc_server_handled_total))

TS metrics-etcd.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "etcd.otel" AND grpc_server_handled_total IS NOT NULL AND attributes.grpc_code IS NOT NULL AND attributes.grpc_code != "OK"
| STATS error_rate = SUM(RATE(grpc_server_handled_total))

TS metrics-etcd.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "etcd.otel" AND grpc_server_handled_total IS NOT NULL AND attributes.grpc_code IS NOT NULL AND attributes.grpc_code != "OK"
| STATS error_rate = SUM(RATE(grpc_server_handled_total))

TS metrics-etcd.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "etcd.otel" AND etcd_server_client_requests_total IS NOT NULL
| STATS rate = SUM(RATE(etcd_server_client_requests_total))

TS metrics-etcd.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "etcd.otel" AND etcd_server_client_requests_total IS NOT NULL
| STATS rate = SUM(RATE(etcd_server_client_requests_total))

TS metrics-etcd.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "etcd.otel" AND etcd_network_client_grpc_received_bytes_total IS NOT NULL
| STATS rate = SUM(RATE(etcd_network_client_grpc_received_bytes_total))

TS metrics-etcd.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "etcd.otel" AND etcd_network_client_grpc_received_bytes_total IS NOT NULL
| STATS rate = SUM(RATE(etcd_network_client_grpc_received_bytes_total))

TS metrics-etcd.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "etcd.otel" AND grpc_server_handled_total IS NOT NULL AND attributes.grpc_service IS NOT NULL
| STATS rate = SUM(RATE(grpc_server_handled_total)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), svc = attributes.grpc_service
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-etcd.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "etcd.otel" AND grpc_server_handled_total IS NOT NULL AND attributes.grpc_service IS NOT NULL
| STATS rate = SUM(RATE(grpc_server_handled_total)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), svc = attributes.grpc_service
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-etcd.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "etcd.otel" AND grpc_server_handled_total IS NOT NULL AND attributes.grpc_code IS NOT NULL
| STATS rate = SUM(RATE(grpc_server_handled_total)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), code = attributes.grpc_code
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-etcd.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "etcd.otel" AND grpc_server_handled_total IS NOT NULL AND attributes.grpc_code IS NOT NULL
| STATS rate = SUM(RATE(grpc_server_handled_total)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), code = attributes.grpc_code
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-etcd.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "etcd.otel" AND grpc_server_handled_total IS NOT NULL AND attributes.grpc_code IS NOT NULL AND attributes.grpc_code != "OK"
| STATS total = SUM(RATE(grpc_server_handled_total)) BY code = attributes.grpc_code
| SORT total DESC
| LIMIT 10

TS metrics-etcd.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "etcd.otel" AND grpc_server_handled_total IS NOT NULL AND attributes.grpc_code IS NOT NULL AND attributes.grpc_code != "OK"
| STATS total = SUM(RATE(grpc_server_handled_total)) BY code = attributes.grpc_code
| SORT total DESC
| LIMIT 10

TS metrics-etcd.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "etcd.otel" AND etcd_server_client_requests_total IS NOT NULL AND attributes.type IS NOT NULL
| STATS total = SUM(RATE(etcd_server_client_requests_total)) BY req_type = attributes.type
| SORT total DESC
| LIMIT 10

TS metrics-etcd.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "etcd.otel" AND etcd_server_client_requests_total IS NOT NULL AND attributes.type IS NOT NULL
| STATS total = SUM(RATE(etcd_server_client_requests_total)) BY req_type = attributes.type
| SORT total DESC
| LIMIT 10

TS metrics-etcd.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "etcd.otel"
| FORK ( WHERE etcd_network_client_grpc_received_bytes_total IS NOT NULL | STATS rate = SUM(RATE(etcd_network_client_grpc_received_bytes_total)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend) | EVAL direction = "received" ) ( WHERE etcd_network_client_grpc_sent_bytes_total IS NOT NULL | STATS rate = SUM(RATE(etcd_network_client_grpc_sent_bytes_total)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend) | EVAL direction = "sent" )

| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-etcd.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "etcd.otel"
| FORK ( WHERE etcd_network_client_grpc_received_bytes_total IS NOT NULL | STATS rate = SUM(RATE(etcd_network_client_grpc_received_bytes_total)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend) | EVAL direction = "received" ) ( WHERE etcd_network_client_grpc_sent_bytes_total IS NOT NULL | STATS rate = SUM(RATE(etcd_network_client_grpc_sent_bytes_total)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend) | EVAL direction = "sent" )

| SORT time_bucket ASC

attributes.title: Top gRPC Methods by Request Rate

query.esql:
TS metrics-etcd.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "etcd.otel" AND grpc_server_handled_total IS NOT NULL AND attributes.grpc_service IS NOT NULL AND attributes.grpc_method IS NOT NULL
| STATS rate = SUM(RATE(grpc_server_handled_total)) BY service = attributes.grpc_service, method = attributes.grpc_method
| SORT rate DESC
| LIMIT 20

TS metrics-etcd.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "etcd.otel" AND grpc_server_handled_total IS NOT NULL AND attributes.grpc_service IS NOT NULL AND attributes.grpc_method IS NOT NULL
| STATS rate = SUM(RATE(grpc_server_handled_total)) BY service = attributes.grpc_service, method = attributes.grpc_method
| SORT rate DESC
| LIMIT 20
